title: Ozik Poyiu
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Ozik Poyiu''' was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who lived during the times of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

Poyiu was the leader of a team known as [[Kwuennox Smugglers]]. During Poyiu's leadership, the Kwuennox Smugglers were decimated by the [[Imperial Military/Legends|forces]] of the Galactic Empire. Poyiu and the Kwuennox Smugglers joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], and Poyiu reformed the team to create the [[Gale Team]].

Poyiu was eventually replaced by [[Aven Cholus]] as [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the Gale Team.
